patterns.label: Standard reading transmission
patterns.description: Normal read cycle: dispatch scheduled → modem ACTIVE → LWM2M recovered → notify success → modem SLEEP

patterns.label: No reading transmission — notify after sleep
patterns.description: Abnormal Tx cycle: dispatch scheduled → modem ACTIVE → Cereg only → modem SLEEP before notify → late notify

patterns.label: Alarm transmission
patterns.description: Normal alarm cycle: dispatch scheduled → modem ACTIVE → LWM2M recovered → notify success → modem SLEEP
